hero.title:
Angelina AI: The WhatsApp AI agent that
automates your
hero.subtitle: Revolutionize your restaurant management. Automate your orders, manage your inventory, handle complaints and coordinate deliveries with our intelligent AI agent specialized for restaurants

statusHero.title: Stop Wasting Mental Energy on
statusHero.subtitle: Your brain wasn't built for repetitive, mundane tasks. Automate your daily WhatsApp statuses, eliminate the anxiety of "forgetting to post," and reclaim your ultimate focus.
statusHero.trialText: Free 14-day trial. No credit card required.

statusNeuro.title: The Hidden Cost of
statusNeuro.subtitle: Science tells us that relying on your memory to complete recurring administrative tasks drains your cognitive battery and limits your business potential.

zeigarnik.title: The Zeigarnik Effect
zeigarnik.description: Every time you remember "I need to post a status," your brain creates a loop of low-level anxiety. Unfinished tasks constantly occupy valuable mental space until they are completed.

decision.title: Decision Fatigue
decision.description: Interrupting an important creative workflow just to open your phone, select an image, and type a caption burns immediate willpower, meaning worse decisions later in the day.

inconsistency.title: Inconsistency Loss
inconsistency.description: Because your brain subconsciously avoids mundane chores, you end up posting sporadically. This breaks the habit with your audience and directly hurts your daily revenue.

statusFeatures.title: Design Your Week,
statusFeatures.subtitle: Psychology shows that offloading tasks to a trusted system instantly reduces stress. Spend 5 minutes on Monday scheduling your pipeline, and enjoy the peace of mind.

precision.title: One-Time Precision
precision.description: Launch a specific promotion exactly when it matters without picking up your phone. Schedule at 2:00 PM on Friday? Consider it done.

recurring.title: Set It & Forget It (Recurring)
recurring.description: Got a 'Motivation Monday' or 'Flash Sale Friday'? Set the frequency array once, and our engine will loop your beautiful content automatically every week.

media.title: Rich Media Native
media.description: Images? Videos? Text captions? Upload them seamlessly. Our Evolution API integration perfectly formats your media into native WhatsApp statuses.

background.title: Instant Background Execution
background.description: Zero overlap crashes and zero delays. Our robust polling engine runs in the absolute background while you focus on sealing deals with customers.

statusCTA.title: Reclaim
statusCTA.subtitle: True freedom isn't just about having more time; it's about having more peace. Stop serving the algorithm manually and start letting Angelina AI do the heavy lifting.

features.title: Powerful Features for
features.subtitle: Everything you need to streamline your restaurant operations and provide exceptional customer service through WhatsApp.
features.comingSoon: And many more features coming soon...

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Choose the plan that fits your restaurant

orders.question: How does the agent handle orders?
orders.answer: Angelina AI presents your menu, takes orders via numbers, automatically checks stock and sends digital invoices.

stocks.question: How does inventory management work?
stocks.answer: The agent checks your stock in real-time via Excel or API, suggests alternatives when out of stock and automatically updates after each order.

complaints.question: What happens with customer complaints?
complaints.answer: The agent analyzes problems, proposes automatic solutions (refund, discount) and escalates to manager for complex cases.

marketplace.question: What is Marketplace Mode?
marketplace.answer: Marketplace mode allows the main Angelina AI assistant to manage all restaurant agents to help customers view, discuss and order from any restaurant.

amadou.name: Amadou Fall
amadou.content: Angelina AI revolutionized our customer service. Orders are taken automatically, no more lost customers! Our sales increased by 45%.

fatou.name: Fatou Diallo
fatou.content: Inventory management is now automatic. The agent suggests alternatives when a dish is no longer available. Our customers love it!

jean.name: Jean-Baptiste Koffi
jean.content: Complaints are handled instantly. The agent proposes solutions and only bothers us for really important cases. Perfect!

marie.name: Marie Agbessi
marie.content: Angelina AI coordinates our deliveries according to urgency and location. No more delays, no more unhappy customers!

kossi.name: Kossi Togbe
kossi.content: The agent informs us in real-time about available stock and allows quick addition of new products. Huge time saver!

grace.name: Grace Lawson
grace.content: Our customers receive notifications at every step: preparation, kitchen exit, delivery. The customer experience is exceptional!

configure.title: Configure Angelina AI
configure.description: Restaurant configures Angelina AI by providing restaurant details: menu, hours, location, and preferences in just a few minutes

generate.title: Agent generated with link & QR code
generate.description: Your personalized AI agent is automatically generated and you receive a unique link and QR code to share with your customers

deploy.title: Use in restaurant & share with clients
deploy.description: Deploy the agent in your restaurant and share the link/QR code with your clients to start receiving orders immediately

marketplace.title: Join the Marketplace Mode
marketplace.description: Your Angelina AI agent is added to the agents network where the main Angelina AI assistant manages all restaurant agents to help end users view, discuss, and order from any restaurant

enterprise.title: Enterprise Ready!
enterprise.subtitle: Security and compliance for your business

privacy.title: Guaranteed Privacy
privacy.description: Your data is protected and encrypted

compliance.title: Global Compliance
compliance.description: Respect for GDPR and international regulations

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: At Angelina AI, we are committed to protecting your privacy and ensuring the security of your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your data when you use our WhatsApp AI agent service for restaurant management.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information that you provide directly to us, including restaurant details, menu information, inventory data, customer orders, and WhatsApp communication data. We also automatically collect usage data, device information, and analytics to improve our service.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.content: We use your information to provide and maintain our AI agent service, process orders, manage inventory, handle customer complaints, coordinate deliveries, and improve our platform. We also use data for analytics, customer support, and to comply with legal obligations.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect your data, including encryption, secure servers, and access controls. Your data is stored securely and we maintain a 99.9% SLA with 24/7 monitoring. We are GDPR compliant and follow international data protection regulations.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content: You have the right to access, correct, or delete your personal information. You can request data portability, object to processing, and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, please contact our support team.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or our data practices, please contact us at privacy@angelina-ai.com or through our support channels.

intro.title: Agreement to Terms
intro.content: By accessing and using Angelina AI's WhatsApp AI agent service, you agree to be bound by these Terms & Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use our service.

serviceDescription.title: Service Description
serviceDescription.content: Angelina AI provides an intelligent WhatsApp-based AI agent that automates restaurant operations including order taking, inventory management, complaint handling, and delivery coordination. We offer various subscription plans with different features and usage limits.

userObligations.title: User Obligations
userObligations.content: You agree to provide accurate restaurant information, maintain the security of your account credentials, use the service in compliance with applicable laws, and not misuse or attempt to disrupt our platform. You are responsible for all activities under your account.

payment.title: Payment Terms
payment.content: Subscription fees are billed monthly or annually based on your chosen plan. Payments are processed securely through our payment partners. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel your subscription at any time. Refunds are provided according to our refund policy.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Angelina AI is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages. Our total liability is limited to the amount you paid for the service in the past 12 months.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your account for violation of these terms, non-payment, or misuse of the service. You may cancel your subscription at any time. Upon termination, your access to the service will cease.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: For questions about these Terms & Conditions, please contact us at legal@angelina-ai.com or through our support channels.
